My Story

About Wulan

I began my career as a banker for 4.5 years at Bank Capital Indonesia — a foundation that shaped me into a deeply people-oriented professional with high analytical thinking and sharp problem-solving instincts. Every day was customer-facing, and every interaction sharpened my ability to listen, adapt, and deliver.

That chapter gave me the rigour. Then came the pivot. I transitioned into the digital, creative, and crypto industry — not just as a trader, but as a builder. I found my passion at the intersection of art, blockchain, and human connection, and everything clicked. Community, creativity, and meaningful impact became the pillars of my career journey. What sets me apart as a creative is a deeply instinctive aesthetic sensibility — a natural eye for beauty, detail, and design that shapes everything I touch, from brand storytelling to visual strategy.

As an ENFJ, networking is genuinely one of my mood-boosters — I thrive when I'm connecting people and ideas. I'm equally creative in planning and organized in execution. Intuitive yet adaptable, I bring both vision and structure to everything I do.

Outside of work, I keep moving — sports, workouts, painting, 10km beach walks, designing costumes, playing guitar, singing, and creating art. If you're into astrology: I'm a Cancer-Leo cusp, Life Path 11 — a rare balance of empathy, ambition, and creative fire.
